info.title: August Public API
info.description: Programmatic access to August. Authenticate every request with a Clerk API key: `Authorization: Bearer ak_...`.

post.description: Submits a query and returns the chat and question ids. The answer is produced asynchronously — poll `GET /chats/{chatId}` for the result.
Cancels a running or pending question. No-op if already in a terminal state. `question_id` is the chat_questions id returned by POST /chats.

patch.description: Renames a chat. Caller must be the chat owner.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a chat and all its messages (FK cascade). Caller must be the chat owner. Irreversible.

get.description: Polls the status of a submitted question, with a lightweight step-count progress signal.
Lists work-product documents generated by a genius-mode question (genius_outputs folders).
Returns the answer, follow-up questions, and citation ids for a completed question. Citation excerpt resolution (doc name/text) is not yet available.

get.summary: Get parsed text content of a document
get.description: Returns the parsed text of a document as ordered chunks. Paginate with startChunkIndex/limit; re-call with startChunkIndex = endChunkIndex + 1 while hasMore is true.

post.description: Three positioning modes: subfolder (parentId), project root (projectId), or personal root (neither). Caller becomes owner.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one or more folders and their whole subtrees (owner-only). folderIds serialize as repeated query params.

get.description: Folders (alphabetical) then files (paginated by cursor/limit). Omit parentFolderId (null) for the personal/project root. All inputs are optional query params; arrays (filterTagIds) serialize as repeated query params. Returns items[] plus total_folders, total_files, nextCursor.
Name search across the accessible folder tree. Pass projectId (optional query param) to scope to a project; omit for the caller's personal workspace. Returns a flat array of folder/file hits.
Returns the recursive folder hierarchy rooted at folderId. Caller must have read access to the folder.

patch.summary: Enable or disable a pre-share policy

post.summary: Revert applied deliveries for a pre-share policy

get.description: Returns every project the authenticated user can access, most recently updated first.

post.description: Creates a new project owned by the caller. The caller is added as the project owner.

get.description: Returns every member of the project with their permission level. Caller must be a project member.
Lists the top-level folders (data sources) the project is anchored to. Caller must be a project member.

patch.description: Renames a project. Caller must be the project owner.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a project and its resource links (chats and folders survive as personal resources). Destructive and irreversible; pass confirm=true.

post.description: Full-text (BM25) search across the parsed text of documents the caller can access. Scope with folderIds and/or docIds; returns matching chunks with highlighted snippets.

post.summary: Create a workflow from a prompt
post.description: Generates a runnable workflow draft from a natural-language prompt and saves it. Reuse idempotencyKey to dedupe retries. Trigger provisioning is best-effort — failures return in triggerWarnings.

issues.description: An array of issues that were responsible for the error
An array of issues that were responsible for the error
An array of issues that were responsible for the error
An array of issues that were responsible for the error
An array of issues that were responsible for the error

Authorization.description: Clerk API key (prefixed `ak_`). Create and manage keys from your August account settings.
